description: Create a content slide on expert opinions about existential risk from superintelligent AI, using a two-column layout with a left process/sidebar and text commentary plus a right sidebar text block.

header.headline: Superintelligent AI, autonomous of human control, poses an existential risk to humanity – Or may prompt a technological wave of innovations
header.sub: Expert opinions on existential risk from superintelligent AI

items.text: Studies envisage (probability of 50%) the occurrence of AI at similar levels to human intelligence by 2040-2050.
Superintelligent AI poses an existential threat to humanity – or helps fulfil its potential.

Vincent Müller & Michael Cannon – Eindhoven University of Technology: There is no sound argument for the existential risk from superintelligent AI if intelligence cannot be assumed to exclude ethical reflection on goals.
Nick Bostrom & Eliezer Yudkowsky – Cambridge University: Superintelligence is one of several existential risks.

sidebar.body: Additional expert commentary is presented in a shaded right-hand sidebar, but the provided source HTML is truncated before the full text can be extracted.
